title: Arts & Crafts X Biomes O Plenty
description: This mod adds integration features for Arts & Crafts and Biomes O Plenty for a smooth gameplay experience!
body:
### About

Arts & Crafts x Biomes O' Plenty is an integration mod that allows both mods to be played together smoothly with both of their content working alongside each other!

**Requires Arts & Crafts, JinxedLib and Biomes O' Plenty with all of their dependencies to be installed**
### Features

- All saplings and plants from Biomes O' Plenty can be placed in dyed flower pots from Arts & Crafts!

### Credits

A massive thanks to Stellari for allowing me to remix the original Arts & Crafts logo for this mod!
